title: Tala Rectangular Silicone Air Fryer Liner 13.5 x 21 x 8cm, Reusable & Flexible Mould, Handles for Easy Removal, Dishwasher Safe, Oven Safe up to 230°C (446°F)
features: ENHANCED AIRFLOW DESIGN: Grooved base promotes better air circulation, ensuring evenly cooked, crispy results every time
FLEXIBLE AND REUSABLE: Made from high-quality silicone, this liner is both flexible and reusable, providing long-lasting use and reducing waste
CONVINIENT HANDLES: Built-in handles allow for easy and safe removal from your air fryer, minimizing the risk of spills and burns
EASY TO CLEAN: Dishwasher safe for quick and hassle-free cleaning ; Keeps your air fryer tray clean and free from residue ; BPA Free
VERSATILE AND DURABLE: Safe for use in the oven up to 230°C, as well as in the fridge and freezer, making it a multifunctional kitchen tool
